title: Bottle Bottle Insulated Water Bottle 950ml(32oz) Stainless Steel Sports Water Bottles with Straw Dual-use Lid Drink Flask Design for Gym with Pill Box (Green)
features: Dual-use Lid Design : This water bottle with straw have a dual-use lid design you can drink through the straw lid directly and also can twist the cap to pour the water. There is a handle on the Sport water bottle lid so you can carry it easily.
With Pill Box : There is a storage space at the bottom of the 32oz water bottle that can be swiveled open. You can use this space to store pills, vitamins, or tea bags.

Vacuum Insulated : Insulated water bottle features double wall 18/8 food-grade stainless steel that keeps the liquids icy for up to 24 hours or piping hot for up to 16 hours. This metal water bottle can help you keep water hot or cold in daily life or sports.

Healthy Material : Stainless steel water bottle made of 100% food-grade 18/8 stainless steel, the water flask is resistant puncture, oxidation, and flavor transfer with extended lifespan. We care about your health and environmental protection.
Customer Service : BOTTLE BOTTLE is a brand specializing in the design of water bottles, we care about customers'experience, if you have any quaetion with the product, please contact us any time.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 climbing 2 traveling 3 vacation
